mapper.select: SELECT `code` FROM `franchise` WHERE `code` LIKE CONCAT(#{codePrefix}, '%') ORDER BY `code` DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT f.`id`, f.`code`, f.`name`, f.`address`, f.`phone`, u.`name` AS ownerName FROM `franchise` f JOIN `hq_user_detail` h ON f.`department_id` = h.`department_id` JOIN `user` u ON f.`owner_id` = u.`id` WHERE h.`user_id` = #{userId} ORDER BY `name`
SELECT f.`id`, f.`code`, f.`name`, f.`address`, f.`phone`, u.`name` AS `ownerName` FROM `franchise` f JOIN `user` u ON f.`owner_id` = u.`id` WHERE f.`manager_id` = #{userId} ORDER BY `name`
SELECT f.`id`, f.`code`, f.`name`, f.`address`, f.`phone`, u.`name` AS `ownerName` FROM `franchise` f JOIN `user` u ON f.`owner_id` = u.`id` WHERE f.`owner_id` = #{userId} ORDER BY `name`

SELECT f.`code`, f.`name`, f.`address`, f.`address_detail`, f.`zipcode`, f.`business_number`, f.`phone`, f.`signed_at`, f.`is_active`, u.`name` AS `owner_name` FROM `franchise` f JOIN `hq_user_detail` h ON f.`department_id` = h.`department_id` LEFT JOIN user u ON f.`owner_id` = u.`id` WHERE f.`id` = #{franchiseId} AND h.`user_id` = #{userId}

SELECT f.`code`, f.`name`, f.`address`, f.`address_detail`, f.`zipcode`, f.`business_number`, f.`phone`, f.`signed_at`, f.`is_active`, u.`name` AS `owner_name` FROM `franchise` f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.`owner_id` = u.`id` WHERE f.`id` = #{franchiseId} AND f.`owner_id` = #{userId}
